name: buzzu
description: BuzzU — Decentralized Anonymous Talk-to-Strangers for BracU Students

scripts.dev:full: pnpm --filter @buzzu/wasm run build:wasm && pnpm -r --parallel run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @buzzu/web run build && pnpm --filter buzzu-signaling run build
scripts.deploy:web: cd apps/web && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name buzzu
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:signaling && pnpm run deploy:matchmaker && pnpm run deploy:web
